{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Protection scripts
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Charity]] and her Archlords fly in at a distance from protection [[scripts]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
